title: Avril
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Avril}} {{Species |image=[[File:Avril.jpg]] |name=Avril |designation= |class=Avian |subspecies= |races= |height= |length=2 [[Meter/Legends|meters]]''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Lyric's World]]'' |wingspan=8 meters |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |eyecolor= |distinctions=*Large blue beak *Twenty-centimeter-long talons |lifespan= |origin=[[Yavin 8/Legends|Yavin 8]] |habitat=Mountains |diet=*[[Melodie]] young *[[Purella]]s *[[Raith (rodent)|Raiths]] *[[Reel]]s |language= }} {{Quote|I was about to be ripped to shred's by the creature's razor-sharp beak."
"What do you mean ripped to shreds?"
"I mean eaten for dinner by a giant bird with a razor-sharp beak and twenty-centimeter talons.|[[Lyric]] and [[Tahiri Veila]] discuss Lyric's experience with an avril|''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Lyric's World]]''}} The '''avril''', native to the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Yavin 8/Legends|Yavin 8]], was a large [[Bird/Legends|bird]] of prey. It was covered with thick black feathers and had beady [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. Avrils also had a wingspan of about eight [[Meter/Legends|meters]] and sharp twenty-[[Centimeter/Legends|centimeter]]-long talons. These birds were also capable of letting out an [[Ear/Legends|ear]]-shattering cry. Avrils were on the top of the food chain on Yavin 8 and preyed on several other [[Species/Legends|species]] including [[Raith (rodent)|raiths]], [[reel]]s, [[purella]]s, though their favorite were the children of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Melodie]]s. {{Creature-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Lyric's World]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *[[Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin'', Second Edition]] {{1stm}} *{{JournalCite|9|ISB Intercepts}} *''[[Alien Encounters]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[File:Avril_Nest.png|thumb|left|200px|An avril nest on [[Yavin 8/Legends|Yavin 8]]]] {{Interlang |de=Avril }} [[Category:Birds]] [[Category:Creatures of Yavin 8]] [[Category:Mountain creatures]] [[Category:Predatory creatures]] [[Category:Species of undefined sentience]]
